# Phase 4 StepControl oracle (Python mpmath/sympy cross-check).
# Cross-validates capture.jl (TI.jl) and capture.wl (wolframscript).

# Case 4.1.1 -- (eps · k!)^(1/k) for k in {29, 30}, eps = 1e-12.
# Source: mpmath at 50 decimal digits.
h_4_1_1_at_29 = 4.501206370338986
h_4_1_1_at_30 = 4.795000636590567
h_4_1_1_min   = 4.501206370338986
h_4_1_1_min_50dps = "4.50120637033898607690318848315848021108523516609"

# Case 4.1.3 -- roots of Q(z) = 1 - z/2.  Pole at z = 2.
roots_4_1_3 = ComplexF64[(2+0j)]
step_4_1_3_expected = 2.0

# Case 4.1.4 -- roots of Q(z) = 1 - 0.6 z + 0.1 z^2.  Poles at z = 3 ± i.
roots_4_1_4 = ComplexF64[(3-1j), (3+1j)]
step_4_1_4_expected = 3.0
